goal: Add downstream worker context preparation that preserves task-relevant fields and removes internal control-state fields.
scope: Small module/function for preparing downstream worker context.
Explicit exclusion of current_state_path, next_action, exact_next_action, repair_count, final_action, and terminal_reason.
Tests proving forbidden fields are excluded and task-relevant fields remain.
inputs: state/intake-summary.md acceptance criteria AC04 and AC07.
Focused M001 product files needed to integrate context helper with package conventions.
expected_outputs: Story packets for context helper and tests.
Product context-containment implementation and tests only after tactical_pre_review PASS and story-level execution.
acceptance_criteria: A public or internal package API prepares worker context from bounded input without depending on Adeptus runtime artifacts.
Forbidden internal control fields are absent from prepared context even when present in input.
Task-relevant non-control fields needed by a worker remain available and are covered by focused tests.
non_goals: No reads from .adeptus/runs as product behavior.
No CLI, docs, persistence, MCP tool changes, or broad refactors.

dependency_summaries.needed_contract: Importable reviewflow package conventions and any stable domain identifiers useful for task context.

allowed_context: focused M001 product files named by the tactical plan
expected_validation: Focused pytest for context containment using python -B -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider or narrower equivalent.

story_guidance.notes: Split helper behavior and focused tests if useful. Lexmechanic owns exact story packets.

stop_conditions: Stop if implementation would require exposing internal control-state as live worker instructions.
Stop if M001 outputs needed for package integration are missing or failed review.
